seo.title: Menu — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
seo.description: Explore our full menu: dim sum daily until 3pm, Cantonese dinner classics, chef's signatures, and weekend brunch.

hero.heading: Our Menus
hero.subheading: From morning dim sum to evening fine dining
hero.subheadingZh: 从早午点心到晚间精致料理

categories.name: Dim Sum
categories.descriptionZh: 逾80种精心制作点心，每日上午10时至下午3时供应

categories.name: Cantonese Dinner
categories.description: Classic Cantonese dishes, whole seafood, roasted meats
categories.descriptionZh: 经典粤菜，鲜活海鲜，烧味拼盘

categories.description: Executive Chef Li Wei's celebrated creations
categories.descriptionZh: 行政主厨李伟的名牌菜式

categories.name: Weekend Brunch
categories.descriptionZh: 周末从早9时30分起，点心品种更丰富
categories.hoursZh: 周六、日 早9时30分 – 下午3时30分

categories.name: Beverages & Tea
categories.description: Curated tea selection, soft drinks, and fresh juices
categories.descriptionZh: 精选茶类、软饮及鲜榨果汁

allergenNote: Please inform your server of any dietary restrictions or allergies. Our kitchen handles shellfish, gluten, soy, nuts, and dairy.
allergenNoteZh: 如有饮食限制或过敏情况，请告知服务员。本厨房处理贝类、麸质、大豆、坚果及乳制品食材。
